description_long: This object is a small, round-bottomed bottle with a wide, bulbous base and a narrow neck, topped with a brown cap. The main body of the bottle is a muted blue color, while the neck is white and tapers smoothly upward. The cap appears to be made of a different material, likely cork or wood, and fits snugly into the neck. The bottle's surface is smooth and has a matte finish, with no visible labels or markings. Its compact size and shape suggest it is designed for holding liquids, possibly for personal or decorative use. There are no visible signs of damage or wear on the exterior.
description: A small, round blue bottle with a narrow white neck and a brown cap, featuring a smooth matte surface and no visible labels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the round blue body, white neck, and brown cap clearly, with the bottle's symmetrical shape centered.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, maintaining the same proportions and features, with no additional details visible.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, showing the same blue body, white neck, and brown cap, with no distinguishing marks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is visually indistinguishable from the other views, highlighting the bottle's uniform, symmetrical design.
